= rpk transform init
:description: Initialize a transform. Create a new transform using a template in the current directory.
:page-aliases: labs:data-transform/rpk-transform-init.adoc
:page-platforms: linux,darwin

// This content is autogenerated. Do not edit manually. To customize content, see the writer's guide: https://github.com/redpanda-data/docs-extensions-and-macros/blob/main/docs-data/RPK_OVERRIDES_GUIDE.adoc

// tag::single-source[]
Initialize a transform.

Create a new transform using a template in the current directory.

A new directory to create by specifying it in the command:

[,bash]
----
rpk transform init foobar
----

This initializes a transform project in the foobar directory.

== Usage

[,bash]
----
rpk transform init <directory> [flags]
----




== Flags

[cols="1m,1a,2a"]
|===
|Value |Type |Description

|--install-deps |bool |If dependencies should be installed for the project.
|-l, --language |string |The language used to develop the transform.
|--name |string |The name of the transform.
|===

== Global flags

[cols="1m,1a,2a"]
|===
|Value |Type |Description

|--config |string |Redpanda or `rpk` config file; default search paths are `/Users/jakecahill/Library/Application Support/rpk/rpk.yaml`, `$PWD/redpanda.yaml`, and `/etc/redpanda/redpanda.yaml`.
|-X, --config-opt |stringArray |Override `rpk` configuration settings; `-X help` for detail or `-X list` for terser detail.
|--ignore-profile |bool |Ignore `rpk.yaml` and `redpanda.yaml`; use default settings.
|--profile |string |`rpk` profile to use.
|-v, --verbose |bool |Enable verbose logging.
|===

// end::single-source[]
